violations.rule: A child must NOT call, reference, or depend on any sibling.
violations.details: JoinChannel takes an 'is_member' parameter that implies it expects the caller to have already checked membership via ValidateUserMembership, creating an implicit dependency between siblings.

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Remove the 'is_member' parameter from JoinChannel and let it independently check membership (e.g., by calling its own data store read) or have the parent handle the membership check and pass the result as a separate input to JoinChannel.
